bead.title: refactor(svelte): NavShell a11y — aria-current active-link styling
bead.description:
Opus Stage 4 batch review (2026-04-15): NavShell.svelte has no aria-current='page' on active links and no visible active-link styling. Minor a11y gap.

Fix: add aria-current={$page.url.pathname.startsWith(href) ? 'page' : undefined} to each nav link + a Tailwind active-state class.
bead.acceptance: (1) Active nav link has aria-current='page'. (2) Visible active style (e.g. bg-gray-100 / font-medium). (3) bun run check green.
